title: Moments for Yermy
html:
TL;DR

  • Yahir writes a sealed-letter sequence for emilio (a.k.a. "Yermy") to open at specific moments of his first year at college — first day, first midterm, first final, first heartbreak, etc.
  • Core thesis to brother: "collabing is undoubtedly the most important aspect of going to college" — relationships > coursework
  • Anti-inspiration framing: explicitly NOT "shitty splash of insight you can find on reddit" — written as personal-insight-from-older-brother, not motivational-poster
  • Reframes midterm/finals stress as a privilege to participate; recommends sleep-over-cram and group-study with awareness of the tomfoolery tax
  • Pattern echo: same older-brother-as-anchor-figure dynamic Yahir has worked through across 2022 10 15 things on 10 1415 2022, 2022 07 18 why mom maya jann brenda dad, the FORD/JCEF essays — formalized here into a literal letter ritual

Notes

A planned series of letters Yahir is writing for his brother to open at college milestones. The slug "Yermy" is one of emilio's family nicknames. Three letters are drafted in this doc (first day, first midterm, first final), with more planned.

The voice is Yahir's at-his-most-mentor — direct, profane, deliberately un-cliché, with the running anti-meta note that "this isn't going to be inspirational reddit shit." The structural insight is that collaboration is the highest-leverage college skill, with the corollary that it's also the easiest place to fool yourself into thinking you're working.

This is the first vault doc that captures Yahir's older brother as anchor role as a deliberate, productized practice — a sealed-envelope ritual designed to deliver the right insight at the right moment, like a letter to self but pointed at someone else. It's also a reverse echo of 2020 10 02 theatre yermy college app todos (where Yahir was the one being shaped) — three years later, he's the shaper.

The unfinished letters in this doc are themselves a stub shaped artifact — Yahir promised his brother an emotional infrastructure, then needs to actually write it. Worth checking 2024–2025 raws for whether the series got finished.

related.label: Theatre Yermy and Yahir — Oct 2020 college-app todos
